title: Five Snowflakes to Midnight
synopsis: Mochi the shiba inu lives inside a snow globe where she's the best dumpling maker. When a legendary dumpling dragon arrives with amazing skills, Mochi must learn that friendship might be more important than being the best. A countdown to midnight brings magical surprises in this whimsical tale of competition and cooperation.

pages.text: The snow globe shakes. Mochi drops her dumpling spoon. It clangs on the tiny kitchen floor. The glass world sparkles around her. Snow swirls past the window. Mochi is the best dumpling maker in the snow globe. She has been for three whole seasons. Her dumplings are perfectly round. They taste like clouds made of soup. Everyone knows this. The other snow globe creatures come to her shop every day. They wait in long lines. They smile when they eat her dumplings.

illustration.description: Mochi, a round chubby shiba inu puppy with cream-and-tan fur, perky triangular ears, a curly tail, and smiling brown eyes, stands in a tiny kitchen inside a snow globe. She's dropping a wooden spoon while looking startled. The kitchen has miniature pots, steaming bamboo steamers, and tiny dumpling-making tools. Snow swirls outside the curved glass walls. Art style: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Mochi the shiba inu dropping her cooking spoon in her tiny snow globe kitchen

pages.text: But today something is different. The snow tastes like ginger. The wind smells like soy sauce. Mochi presses her nose to the glass. Outside the snow globe, giant fingers hold a letter. The letter slides through the magic mail slot. It lands on her counter. Mochi reads it. Her tail stops wagging. 'Dear Snow Globe,' the letter says. 'The Great Dumpling Dragon is coming. She makes the most perfect dumplings in all the worlds. She will arrive at midnight. Signed, The Council of Mythical Chefs.'

illustration.description: Mochi, a round chubby shiba inu puppy with cream-and-tan fur, perky triangular ears, a curly tail, and smiling brown eyes, holds a glowing letter while standing near the curved glass wall of the snow globe. Her expression shows worry and her tail droops. Giant human fingers are visible through the glass outside. The letter glows with magical text. Art style: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Worried Mochi reading a magical letter about the Great Dumpling Dragon

pages.text: Mochi runs to her neighbor's house. Mrs. Hedgehog is watering her upside-down flowers. The flowers grow toward the bottom of the snow globe. This is normal here. 'Mrs. Hedgehog!' Mochi barks. 'Did you hear about the dragon?' Mrs. Hedgehog nods. Her quills sparkle with snow. 'Oh yes, little puppy. Dragons are very good at everything. Especially cooking. Especially dumplings.' Mochi's ears droop. 'But I'm the best dumpling maker!' Mrs. Hedgehog pats Mochi's head. 'You are very good. But dragons are dragons.'

illustration.description: Mochi, a round chubby shiba inu puppy with cream-and-tan fur, perky triangular ears, a curly tail, and smiling brown eyes, talks to Mrs. Hedgehog who is watering upside-down flowers that grow toward the bottom of the snow globe. Mochi looks worried while Mrs. Hedgehog seems calm. Snow swirls around them in the magical curved world. Art style: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Mochi talking to Mrs. Hedgehog about the dragon while hedgehog waters upside-down flowers

pages.text: Mochi walks to the center of the snow globe. Here stands the Midnight Clock. It has four hands instead of two. One hand points to feelings. One points to weather. One points to magic levels. One points to time. Right now the time hand points to eight o'clock. Four hours until midnight. Four hours until the dragon arrives. Mochi sits by the clock. She thinks about her dumplings. Maybe they are not so perfect after all. Maybe they are just... good. The snow tastes sadder now.

illustration.description: Mochi, a round chubby shiba inu puppy with cream-and-tan fur, perky triangular ears, a curly tail, and smiling brown eyes, sits sadly next to a magical clock with four hands. The clock is tall and ornate, glowing with mystical energy. Each hand points to different things - feelings, weather, magic, and time. Snow continues to fall around them in the curved glass world. Art style: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Sad Mochi sitting by the magical four-handed Midnight Clock

pages.text: Mochi decides to practice. She goes back to her kitchen. She rolls dumpling dough. She chops vegetables very small. She folds dumpling skins in perfect pleats. Seventeen pleats per dumpling. This is her special number. The dumplings look beautiful. They steam in neat rows. Mochi tastes one. It is delicious. But her heart feels heavy. What if the dragon's dumplings have thirty-four pleats? What if dragon dumplings can fly? What if they taste like happiness and dreams?

illustration.description: Mochi, a round chubby shiba inu puppy with cream-and-tan fur, perky triangular ears, a curly tail, and smiling brown eyes, works frantically in her kitchen, surrounded by perfectly folded dumplings with exactly seventeen pleats each. Steam rises from bamboo steamers. Her expression shows determination mixed with worry. Dumpling ingredients are scattered around the tiny kitchen. Art style: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Mochi making dumplings with seventeen pleats while looking worried about the competition

pages.text: The doorbell rings. Mr. Rabbit hops in. Behind him comes Ms. Turtle. Then the three Mouse Brothers. They all look excited. 'Mochi!' says Mr. Rabbit. 'We heard about the dragon! This is so amazing!' Ms. Turtle nods slowly. 'A real dragon. In our snow globe. I have never seen a dragon.' The Mouse Brothers squeak in unison. 'We love dragons! Dragons are the best!' Mochi tries to smile. Her smile feels wobbly. 'Yes,' she says. 'Dragons are... great.'

illustration.description: Mochi, a round chubby shiba inu puppy with cream-and-tan fur, perky triangular ears, a curly tail, and smiling brown eyes, forces a wobbly smile while surrounded by excited neighbors - Mr. Rabbit, Ms. Turtle, and three identical Mouse Brothers. All the animals look thrilled except Mochi who appears worried. They're gathered in her cozy dumpling shop. Art style: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Mochi trying to smile while her excited neighbors talk about the dragon

pages.text: Two hours left. Mochi cannot sleep. She walks around the snow globe. The paths glow with soft light. Everything is quiet except for the gentle snow sounds. Mochi passes the Wishing Fountain. She passes the Backwards Library. She passes the shop that sells bottled laughter. All the places feel the same as always. But Mochi feels different. She feels small. Smaller than usual. Even for a puppy in a snow globe.

illustration.description: Mochi, a round chubby shiba inu puppy with cream-and-tan fur, perky triangular ears, a curly tail, and smiling brown eyes, walks alone on a glowing path through the magical snow globe town. She passes whimsical shops - the Backwards Library, the Wishing Fountain, and a shop with bottles of glowing laughter. She looks very small and sad. Snow falls gently around her. Art style: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Lonely Mochi walking through the magical snow globe town at night

pages.text: Suddenly the snow globe shakes again. But this time it shakes differently. It shakes with purpose. Golden light fills the air. Sparkles rain down like confetti. A voice echoes from everywhere and nowhere. 'I have arrived!' the voice says. It sounds warm and friendly. Not scary at all. Mochi looks up. Floating in the center of the snow globe is the Great Dumpling Dragon. She is smaller than Mochi expected. She is silver and shiny. She has tiny wings that flutter very fast.

illustration.description: The Great Dumpling Dragon appears in the center of the snow globe - a small, shiny silver dragon with tiny rapidly-fluttering wings, surrounded by golden light and sparkles. Mochi, a round chubby shiba inu puppy with cream-and-tan fur, perky triangular ears, a curly tail, and smiling brown eyes, looks up in amazement from below. The dragon looks friendly rather than scary. Art style: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: The small, friendly Great Dumpling Dragon appearing in golden light while Mochi watches from below

pages.text: One hour until midnight. The dragon lands next to Mochi. Up close, she is even smaller. About the size of a house cat. Her scales shimmer like soap bubbles. 'Hello!' says the dragon. 'I am Bao. I make dumplings. You must be Mochi!' Mochi nods. She cannot think of words. Bao smiles. Dragons have very big smiles. 'I have heard wonderful things about your dumplings. Everyone in the other worlds talks about them. The puppy in the snow globe who makes dumpling magic!'

illustration.description: Bao the Great Dumpling Dragon, small and silver with soap-bubble scales and tiny wings, stands next to Mochi, a round chubby shiba inu puppy with cream-and-tan fur, perky triangular ears, a curly tail, and smiling brown eyes. Bao is about cat-sized and has a big friendly smile. They're standing on the glowing path with the Midnight Clock visible in the background. Art style: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Small friendly dragon Bao meeting surprised Mochi on the glowing path

pages.text: Mochi blinks. 'Other worlds know about my dumplings?' Bao nods enthusiastically. 'Oh yes! The Cloud Kingdom orders them for special parties. The Underground Cities buy them for celebrations. The Floating Islands serve them to important guests. You are famous, Mochi!' Mochi's tail starts to wag a little. 'But... but you are the Great Dumpling Dragon. You must be better than me.' Bao tilts her head. 'Better? No. Different! I make sky dumplings. You make earth dumplings. The world needs both kinds.'

illustration.description: Bao the small silver dragon with tiny wings gestures enthusiastically while explaining to Mochi, a round chubby shiba inu puppy with cream-and-tan fur, perky triangular ears, a curly tail, and smiling brown eyes, whose tail has started wagging slightly. Around them float magical images showing the Cloud Kingdom, Underground Cities, and Floating Islands. Art style: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Dragon Bao enthusiastically telling Mochi about her famous dumplings while magical worlds appear around them

pages.text: Midnight arrives. The Midnight Clock chimes with silver bells. All of Mochi's neighbors come running. They want to see dragon dumplings. Bao and Mochi work together in the tiny kitchen. Bao makes sky dumplings that float in the air. They are light blue and taste like clouds. Mochi makes her earth dumplings. They are golden brown and taste like warm hugs. Everyone tries both kinds. Everyone smiles very big smiles.

illustration.description: The kitchen scene shows both Bao the small silver dragon with tiny wings and Mochi, a round chubby shiba inu puppy with cream-and-tan fur, perky triangular ears, a curly tail, and smiling brown eyes, cooking together. Light blue floating dumplings drift through the air while golden brown dumplings sit in steamers. All the neighbors crowd around watching in amazement - Mr. Rabbit, Ms. Turtle, Mouse Brothers, Mrs. Hedgehog. Art style: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Bao and Mochi cooking together while neighbors watch floating blue dumplings and golden brown dumplings

pages.text: 'These are both perfect!' says Mrs. Hedgehog. 'But perfect in different ways!' Mr. Rabbit agrees. 'Sky dumplings make me feel like flying. Earth dumplings make me feel like home.' The Mouse Brothers squeak happily. 'We love both! Can we have both every day?' Bao looks at Mochi. 'Would you like a partner? We could open the first Sky-and-Earth Dumpling Shop!' Mochi wags her tail so hard her whole body wiggles. 'Yes! Yes! That sounds perfect!' The snow globe fills with happy laughter. The snow tastes like friendship now.

illustration.description: A celebration scene inside the snow globe showing Mochi, a round chubby shiba inu puppy with cream-and-tan fur, perky triangular ears, a curly tail, and smiling brown eyes, wagging her tail so hard her whole body wiggles, while Bao the small silver dragon with tiny wings smiles beside her. All the neighbors are laughing and celebrating. Both floating blue dumplings and golden brown dumplings fill the air. The whole scene glows with warm, happy light. Art style: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Mochi wiggling with excitement while everyone celebrates the new Sky-and-Earth Dumpling Shop partnership

metadata.lessonFocus: Learning that different skills can complement each other rather than compete

coverPrompt.description: A magical snow globe scene showing Mochi, a round chubby shiba inu puppy with cream-and-tan fur, perky triangular ears, a curly tail, and smiling brown eyes, standing next to a majestic silver dragon with tiny wings. They're both holding steaming dumplings while snowflakes swirl around them. The background shows tiny houses and dumpling shops inside the curved glass world. Art style: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel.
coverPrompt.alt: Mochi the shiba inu and a silver dragon sharing dumplings inside a snow globe

questions.question: What makes Mochi's dumplings special?
questions.explanation: Mochi folds exactly seventeen pleats in each dumpling, which is her special number.

questions.question: How is the Great Dumpling Dragon different from what Mochi expected?
choices: She doesn't know how to cook
questions.explanation: Bao the dragon turns out to be about cat-sized and very friendly, not scary at all.

questions.question: What do Bao's sky dumplings taste like?
questions.explanation: Bao's floating blue sky dumplings taste like clouds and make people feel like flying.

questions.question: What does the Midnight Clock have that regular clocks don't?
questions.explanation: The Midnight Clock has four hands that point to feelings, weather, magic levels, and time.

questions.question: What do Mochi and Bao decide to do together?
questions.explanation: They become partners and decide to open the first Sky-and-Earth Dumpling Shop together.
